summary: Tested session join and attendance confirmation features. Backend: 10/11 tests passed (1 skipped due to no available slots). Frontend: UI verified - student dashboard shows join button with status indicator, teacher dashboard has attendance confirmation buttons and badges.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/join correctly records join_clicked_at timestamp and returns recitation_link
PUT /api/sessions/{session_id}/attendance correctly confirms attendance and marks session as completed when attended=true
Session model has new fields: join_clicked_at, attendance_confirmed, attendance_confirmed_at
Student's handleJoinSession uses window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer') to open meet in new tab
Teacher's handleConfirmAttendance calls PUT /sessions/{id}/attendance with attended boolean
Attendance badges (حاضر/غائب/لم يتم تأكيد الحضور) correctly displayed in completed sessions
Rating dialog includes attendance confirmation section when attendance_confirmed is null
Authorization checks: Only session student can call join, only session teacher can confirm attendance
seed_data_creation: Created test student user for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session join and attendance features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/sessions/{id}/join (student records join click, returns meet link), PUT /api/sessions/{id}/attendance (teacher confirms attendance). Session model has join_clicked_at, attendance_confirmed, attendance_confirmed_at fields. Frontend correctly implements: 1) Student join button calls API then opens meet in new tab, 2) Button text changes to 'إعادة الدخول' after join, 3) Teacher sees 'الطالب دخل الحصة' indicator, 4) Attendance confirmation buttons (حاضر/غائب) on completed sessions, 5) Attendance badges in completed sessions list, 6) Rating dialog includes attendance confirmation when not yet confirmed.

verified_features.join_endpoint: PASSED - POST /sessions/{id}/join records timestamp and returns meet link
verified_features.attendance_endpoint: PASSED - PUT /sessions/{id}/attendance confirms attendance and marks completed
verified_features.authorization_join: PASSED - Only session student can call join endpoint
verified_features.authorization_attendance: PASSED - Only session teacher can confirm attendance
verified_features.session_model_fields: PASSED - join_clicked_at, attendance_confirmed, attendance_confirmed_at fields exist
verified_features.student_join_ui: PASSED - Join button calls API, opens meet in new tab, shows status indicator
verified_features.teacher_join_indicator: PASSED - Shows 'الطالب دخل الحصة' when join_clicked_at exists
verified_features.attendance_badges: PASSED - Shows حاضر/غائب/لم يتم تأكيد الحضور badges
verified_features.attendance_buttons: PASSED - Confirm attend/absent buttons when attendance_confirmed is null
verified_features.rating_dialog_attendance: PASSED - Includes attendance confirmation section when not confirmed
